Mortgage Application Complaints.description: Complaints about negative mortgage application decisions

subcategories.Not enough income: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision based on insufficient income, without providing additional income evidence
subcategories.Not enough income - Customer provides in: Customer contests the insufficient income refusal and submits supporting documents (e.g. salary statements, employment contracts, tax returns) to demonstrate their income meets the threshold
subcategories.Not enough transactions: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision based on insufficient transaction history, without providing additional evidence
subcategories.Not enough transactions - Customer provi: Customer contests the insufficient transaction history refusal and submits supporting documents (e.g. bank statements, salary credit history) to prove adequate account activity
subcategories.Wrong / incomplete documents: Customer contests a negative mortgage decision caused by missing or incomplete documents, without resubmitting the missing items
subcategories.Wrong / incomplete documents - Customer: Customer contests the wrong or incomplete documents refusal and resubmits the required or corrected documentation to complete the application package

Other.description: Mortgage application complaints not fitting the main refusal reasons

subcategories.General Mortgage Application Complaint: General mortgage application issue not covered by specific refusal reasons
